source.name: Lab 3.1: Create Your Own Action
source.instructions:
To pass this assessment, all of the following checks must pass:

• Check 1: actions/action_holiday_hours.py exists.
• Check 2: File has correct imports (Action from rasa_sdk, CollectingDispatcher from rasa_sdk.executor).
• Check 3: datetime is used for date-based logic (e.g. holiday message).
• Check 4: Class ActionHolidayHours(Action) is defined.
• Check 5: name() returns 'action_holiday_hours'.
• Check 6: run() calls dispatcher.utter_message() and returns [].
source.guidance: The grader checks that actions/action_holiday_hours.py exists, has the correct imports (including datetime), class ActionHolidayHours(Action), name() returning 'action_holiday_hours', and run() calling dispatcher.utter_message() and returning [].
